framework.name: Visa Trusted Agent Protocol (TAP)
framework.description: RFC 9421-compliant cryptographic signature protocol for AI agents to prove identity and authorization to merchants. Uses domain-bound, timestamp-validated signatures with session identifiers to prevent replay attacks. Agents present signatures containing key identifiers, algorithm identifiers, and transaction-specific authorization scope (browsing vs payment).
framework.raw_quote: Visa's Trusted Agent Protocol provides a standardized, cryptographic method for an AI agent to prove its identity and associated authorization directly to merchants. By presenting a secure digital signature with every interaction, a merchant can verify that an agent is legitimate and has the user's permission to act.

source.title: GitHub - visa/trusted-agent-protocol: Establishing a universal standard of trust between AI agents and merchants for the next phase of agentic commerce. · GitHub
